subcodes.first_line: O pilgrim to the Sacred Sepulchre! Give thanks unto God that thou hast been honoured with this divine bounty and traversed mountain and desert [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر تربت مقدسه شکر کن خدا را که باین فیض الهی مشرف گشتی و کوه و بیابان
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @predictions and prophecies, @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement
